metricsConfiguration.description: An object that specifies whether cloud metrics are collected in a deployment and, if so, what role is used to collect metrics.

cloudMetricEnabled.description: A Boolean that specifies whether cloud metrics are collected.

metricRuleRoleArn.description: The ARN of the role that is used to collect cloud metrics.

validatedNamespaceVersion.description: The version of the user's namespace against which the system instance was validated.

validatedDependencyRevisions.description: A list of objects that contain all of the IDs and revision numbers of workflows and systems that are used in a system instance.

flowActionsRoleArn.description: The AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) role that AWS IoT Things Graph assumes during flow execution in a cloud deployment. This role must have read and write permissionss to AWS Lambda and AWS IoT and to any other AWS services that the flow uses.

payload.description: A string containing information about the flow event.

tags.description: List of tags returned by the ListTagsForResource operation.

nextToken.description: The token that specifies the next page of results to return.

key.description: The required name of the tag. The string value can be from 1 to 128 Unicode characters in length.

value.description: The optional value of the tag. The string value can be from 1 to 256 Unicode characters in length.
